title: rubus meyeri
intro: Rubus meyeri, also known as the Chinese raspberry or Meyer's raspberry, is a species of raspberry that is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus meyeri include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Rubus meyeri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
